no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: `go test ./internal/server/graphql -count=1` fails before the new `promptSha` coverage can be validated because the package currently contains duplicate resolver method definitions in both `cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver.go` and `cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_feat008.go` (for example `BeadClose`, `WorkerDispatch`, `EfficacyRows`, and `EfficacyAttempts`). The generated GraphQL surface also expects the new optional `promptSha` argument, but the package cannot compile until the duplicate resolver layout is untangled. The prompt-size CI fixture and session-index `prompt_sha` plumbing were updated, but end-to-end verification is blocked by this broader GraphQL packaging issue.
